sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ طَبَقُ الْكُسْكُسِ مِنَ الْأَكَلَاتِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ فِي الْمَغْرِبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus se smatra jednim od najpoznatijih jela u arapskom Magrebu.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous is considered one of the most famous dishes in the Arab Maghreb.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّعَامُ مِنَ الْقَمْحِ وَالْخُضَارِ وَاللَّحْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova hrana se sastoji od pšenice, povrća i mesa.
sentences.translationEn: This food consists of wheat, vegetables, and meat.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِهِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja oko jedne trpeze kako bi ga jela petkom.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around one table to eat it on Fridays.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْكِبَارُ وَالصِّغَارُ طَعْمَهُ اللَّذِيذَ وَالْمُمَيَّزَ.
sentences.translation: I stari i mladi vole njegov ukusan i poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Both adults and children love its delicious and unique taste.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلْوَحْدَةِ وَالْمُشَارَكَةِ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: On je simbol jedinstva i dijeljenja u posebnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: It is a symbol of unity and sharing on occasions.
